patches.rationale: nssdc.gsfc.nasa.gov/planetary/factsheet/earthfact.html redirects to SSDC status page (www.nasa.gov/nssdc/); cited resource (Earth axial tilt 23.45°) no longer available. Replaced with science.nasa.gov/earth/facts/ which is HTTP 200 and explicitly states '23.4 degrees' axial tilt.

earthobservatory.nasa.gov/images/51173/crepuscular-rays redirects to Earth Observatory homepage; the specific image/article is gone. Replaced with atoptics.co.uk/blog/crepuscular-rays/ which is HTTP 200 and covers the same photographic documentation of crepuscular rays converging at the anti-solar point.

heartmath.org/research/global-coherence/gcms/ redirects chain to generic research page. Replaced with www.heartmath.org/gci-research/ which is HTTP 200 and is the current landing page for HeartMath's Global Coherence Initiative research program.
